Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and SW-Checklist Completed across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Checklist Completed to occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total waiting time to the SW-Checklist Completed activity following Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Checklist Completed in variants that include a checklist due reminder (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be done after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission appears in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum resolution time of SW-Checklist Completed in cases where Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded occurs
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed in variants leading to SW-EIC Reject versus those leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time of SW-Checklist Completed relative to the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time between SW-Checklist Completed and the subsequent SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be executed after the appearance of SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in complex variants involving multiple reviewer declines
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Cycle Time of SW-Checklist Completed measured from case start (Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation or SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion) to its completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time for SW-Checklist Completed grouped by case:concept:name
